UNO.

Join or Create a Room

UNO Rules

Goal: Be the first player to get rid of all your cards.

Play: Match the top card of the discard pile by color or number/symbol.

Action Cards:

  • Skip: Next player skips their turn.
  • Reverse: Reverses direction of play.
  • Draw 2: Next player draws 2 cards and skips turn.
  • Wild: Change the color being played.
  • Wild Draw 4: Change color AND next player draws 4 (skipping turn).

🏆 Round Over! 🏆

    Room: ...
